query:
UPDATE tenants
           SET banner_text = CASE
                   WHEN $4 THEN NULL
                   WHEN $2 = $5 THEN banner_text
                   WHEN $2 = '' THEN NULL
                   ELSE $2
               END,
               banner_url = CASE
                   WHEN $4 THEN NULL
                   WHEN $3 = $5 THEN banner_url
                   WHEN $3 = '' THEN NULL
                   ELSE $3
               END
         WHERE id = $1
